title: Verify splash screen display
test_steps: Open the application. | Observe the splash screen.
expected_result: The splash screen should display the status bar with icons, the image of four individuals, the 'FIRST ALERT WEATHER' logo, and the text 'Let's Get Started'.

title: Verify splash screen text interaction
test_steps: Open the application. | Tap on the 'Let's Get Started' text.
expected_result: The application should transition to the next screen.

title: Verify splash screen image interaction
test_steps: Open the application. | Tap on the image of four individuals.
expected_result: The application should transition to the next screen.

title: Verify splash screen logo interaction
test_steps: Open the application. | Tap on the 'FIRST ALERT WEATHER' logo.
expected_result: The application should transition to the next screen.
